summary: Frontend-only verification of Career Navigator Phase 2 bug fixes (FIX 1 horizontal role strip + FIX 2 visible CTA buttons at rest) on /career-hub. All acceptance criteria pass. No console errors. No backend testing performed (per request).

FIX_1_role_strip.strip_below_buttons: Find-button bottom=285px, Strip top=305px (strip is below CTA row)
FIX_1_role_strip.strip_full_width: strip width=864px matching hero container width

interactions.find_my_path_click_switches_tab: Placeholder shows 'paths' text after click — PASS
interactions.payroll_chip_click_no_error: PASS (no JS exceptions, no console errors)

verification_results.console_errors: None observed on page load or during interactions

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: hover handlers on the CTA buttons in HomeTab.jsx use inline onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave to override the background. This works but is slightly fragile — a stray pointer event during mount could swap states. Not a defect for this bug fix; consider moving to CSS-in-JS or a tiny stylesheet later.

Minor: RoleStrip chips use onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave to swap background only (no important flag). If a future global button reset is added, chips could also go flat — apply the same setProperty('important') pattern used on the hero CTAs for resilience.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Career Navigator is mid-incremental-build. Only Home tab is implemented; clicking 'Career paths', 'Interview prep', or 'Industry pulse' shows a placeholder with just the tab id (career-navigator-placeholder) — this is intentional, do NOT report as a bug. Hero CTAs apply resting styles via ref + el.style.setProperty(..., 'important') because a global button theme used to flatten them — keep an eye that any future button refactor preserves this guard. Both bug fixes from Phase 2 verified PASS.
rca_of_the_issue: Original issue 1 (role panel on right): old layout used a vertical RolePanel column inside HeroMast's right slot, causing a large empty left area. Fix replaced it with a full-width RoleStrip rendered after the CTA row inside the hero content slot — verified by absence of career-home-role-panel and presence of career-home-role-strip with width matching hero. Original issue 2 (flat invisible buttons): a global CSS rule (likely shadcn/ui Button or a layout reset) was overriding inline style props. Fix uses React refs (setFindRest, setStartRest) that call el.style.setProperty('background'|'color'|'border', value, 'important') after mount, which beats global styles — verified via getComputedStyle returning the exact expected values.
